text.title: FinOps — Cloud Cost Allocation via Tagging Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the config artefact this methodology produces, with valid + invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.note: Required field set to null and other required fields missing.

list.item: required_tags: must match array minItems 5: team, service, environment, cost-center, owner-email; otherwise reject.
enforcement: must match enum: scp-deny, org-policy-deny, azure-policy-deny; otherwise reject.
controlled_vocabularies: must match object: each required tag has a list of allowed values; otherwise reject.
daily_drift_report: must match boolean const true; otherwise reject.
cost_allocation_tags_activated: must match boolean const true; otherwise reject.
